title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: New York / Tel Aviv (Global, B2B SaaS)
description: Reporting to the CRO, the Head of Revenue Operations builds and scales the operational backbone of Finout's go-to-market engine. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. Involves collaborating with globally distributed teams including the Tel Aviv HQ. A strategic leader-doer who can own executive strategy while building flows, dashboards, and data models.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, senior RevOps expertise aligns perfectly with Head of Revenue Operations scope, deep Salesforce + analytics skills match core needs, and scaling experience in B2B SaaS GTM directly transfers. Tel Aviv HQ is a primary location preference.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and your background immediately stood out—15+ years scaling RevOps in B2B SaaS, with deep Salesforce mastery and experience building revenue analytics frameworks at scale, is exactly what the CRO is looking to anchor their GTM engine. Given your familiarity with Tel Aviv and track record driving operational excellence across Sales, Marketing, and Finance functions in high-growth environments, this feels like a natural next step. Would be great to explore how your experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR could accelerate Finout's go-to-market maturity.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: As RevOps Manager focused on Territory Strategy & Operations, you'll accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Maintain territory mapping in CRM systems (Fullcast, Salesforce), partner with Sales leadership and Finance to optimize territory composition, and lead special projects like market expansion. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations or Sales Strategy, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and Salesforce proficiency.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with deep Salesforce expertise, pipeline forecasting, and GTM optimization directly align with this territory strategy and operations focus. The role's emphasis on data-driven territory design, seller productivity, and cross-functional leadership (Sales/Finance) matches his senior executive background perfectly.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building revenue operations infrastructure at B2B SaaS companies—from pipeline forecasting to territory optimization—and Gong's approach to using data-driven territory strategy to accelerate seller productivity resonates deeply with how I think about RevOps. Your focus on scalable territory design and Salesforce/Fullcast integration is exactly where I've driven the most impact, and I'd be interested in exploring how I could bring that experience to your team.

title: RevOps Manager

Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, Marketing Operations, or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, complex workflows, APIs), hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred, Salesforce acceptable), and data architecture/integration experience. US target salary band is $120,000–$170,000 plus equity.

With 15+ years building revenue infrastructure at scale in B2B SaaS, I've architected exactly what you're describing: CRM data models that drove predictability, multi-source data integrations (especially around funding/grants workflows), and technical implementations of AI tools into sales processes. The builder mandate here—owning technical infrastructure end-to-end—is where I've created the most impact.

title: GTM Engineer

I'd like to explore whether you need someone who can architect the GTM automation stack *and* own the operational outcomes it drives.
